## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

List the commands or manual checks used to verify the change.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and contains no unrelated refactoring.
- [ ] Frontend lint passes.
- [ ] Backend lint passes.
- [ ] Relevant tests pass.
- [ ] No secrets, uploaded resumes, build output, or virtual environments are
      included.
- [ ] Documentation is updated when needed.
